results.title: share company staff directory hook for inbox ui
results.content: Created useCompanyStaffDirectory hook to centralize company staff query, options mapping, and id-to-name resolution. Refactored ConversationHeader and SystemMessage to reuse it, reducing duplicate queries/mapping logic. Files: src/hooks/common/useCompanyStaffDirectory.ts, src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/inboxes/_sections/ConversationHeader.tsx, src/app/[locale]/(company)/company/[companyId]/inboxes/_components/message-renderers/SystemMessage.tsx

results.title: OMS API products module extended with skus and images
results.content: Extended Products module to support product_skus and product_images under organization-scoped routes. Added domain models/repositories, DTOs, use-cases create/list for skus and images, TypeORM entities and repositories, module provider wiring, controller endpoints under /v1/organizations/:organizationId/products/:productId/(skus|images), and migration 1771000003000-CreateProductSkusAndImagesTables with FK to products and unique (product_id, sku_code). Preserved existing products endpoints and company ownership checks via findByIdInOrganization. Verified with yarn lint, yarn build, yarn test.

results.title: Configurations use GetOrCreateCompanyUseCase for externalCompanyId
results.content: Replaced GetCompanyByIdUseCase with GetOrCreateCompanyUseCase in public channel configuration use cases so configurations module auto-ensures local company records when resolving externalCompanyId. Files: src/modules/configurations/application/use-cases/get-public-channel-configuration.use-case.ts, get-public-channels.use-case.ts, upsert-public-channels-configuration.use-case.ts

results.title: CRM customerSource partner i18n key
results.content: Added missing enum.customerSource.partner translations across en/vi/id/ja/zh in findtourgoUI. The CRM customer account form/detail screens resolve source labels via t('enum.customerSource.'), so partner must exist under customerSource in every locale, not only under customerType/customerStage.

results.title: OMS API products module company-scoped
results.content: Implemented clean-architecture Products module in NestJS scoped by organization/company. Added Product domain model and repository contract, DTO and use-cases (create/get/list), TypeORM entity and repository, controller routes under /v1/organizations/:organizationId/products, module wiring in AppModule, and migration 1771000002000-CreateProductsTable with FK to organizations and unique (organization_id, sku). Validation includes name, productType, sku, and optional image/description/color/size/storage/isCustom/status. Verified with yarn lint, yarn build, yarn test.
